name_en: A2211 In Stock Chanel 🌱Vintage Backpack Black Lambskin
name_cn:
A2211 In Stock Chanel 🌱Vintage Backpack Black Lambskin
No exaggeration ❤️ This is a vintage backpack that can be passed down for generations! Classic double C logo,
quilted pattern paired with gold metal and leather chain strap for a rich texture
Small lambskin is soft and delicate, you can't help but want to own and care for it! Suitable for all seasons and any style 💃
A must-have in your bag collection
Small: 17*7*15cm.
9981053
